text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking along the riverside, a<n>canoe
stops at the bank and an<n>Umamusume hops off.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
At long last! Land ho! Hail, yon<n>traveler! Riddle
me this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What does one need to survive upon<n>these
yet-to-be-traversed lands?!<n>Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence! I was thinking<n>the same
thing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Righty-o! To commemorate this<n>occasion, I'll
teach you the secret to<n>building stamina! You
wanna hear it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The secret is... finding it yourself!<n>Otherwise this
whole charade is<n>meaningless!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Remember—one must always have an<n>
adventurous heart!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that cryptic exclamation, Gold<n>Ship returns to
her canoe and paddles<n>down the river...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, it's important to stick to your<n>guns if you
want any hope of<n>surviving in a harsh
environment!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And if it's sticky things you want,<n>well, what's
stickier than natto?! In<n>other words, if you eat
natto...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You'll stick to your guns<n>like none
other and will never give up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
By the way, natto tastes way better<n>and fluffier if
you mix it up first before<n>adding soy sauce! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that cryptic exclamation, Gold<n>Ship returns to
her canoe and paddles<n>down the river...
